title: Fatal Motorcycle Accident Under Investigation in Iredell County
summary: A deadly motorcycle crash in Iredell County led to a road closure as authorities investigate the incident.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing risks associated with traffic accidents and the importance of road safety measures.

title: Charlotte Area Faces Extreme Heat and Increased Fire Danger
summary: The Carolinas are bracing for record heat, raising concerns about drought conditions and potential wildfires.

title: Stabbing Incident in Cornelius Claims One Life
summary: A fatal stabbing occurred on Ruffner Drive in Cornelius, prompting a police investigation.

title: CMS Funding at Risk Amid State Budget Delay

title: SC Governor Calls for Probe into York County Charter School

title: Fort Mill School Recovers After Chemical Leak

title: CATS Announces $10M Safety Boost in 2027 Budget

title: Understanding the Crane Fly Phenomenon
summary: Crane flies are often mistaken for mosquitoes, but they are harmless and do not bite.
charlotte_impact: Provides public education about common insects and dispels misconceptions.

title: Cabarrus County Clerk Retains Office After Dismissal of Removal Case
summary: Allegations of misconduct against Cabarrus County clerk Bill Baggs are rejected in court.

title: Mecklenburg Leaders Oppose Property Tax Cap Amendment

title: Mecklenburg Resident Wins Lottery, Pays Off Mortgage

title: Lincoln County Man Arrested for Arson

charlotte_impact: Arson is a serious crime that endangers lives and property.

title: Two Charged with Armed Robbery in Union County Drug Deal

title: High-Speed Chase Ends in Crash; Suspect at Large in Rowan County
summary: A high-speed chase in Rowan County ends in a violent crash, with the suspect still on the run.

title: Greensboro Police Apologize for Facebook Post Targeting Commenter
